name: Tower Defense: Last Castle
short_description: In the depths of an ancient forest, your castle the last human stronghold stands as the final bastion against a monstrous horde. Strategize your defense by employing soldiers, traps, towers, and even the monsters themselves.
detailed_description:
In the depths of an ancient forest, your castle the last human stronghold stands as the final bastion against a monstrous horde. Strategize your defense by employing soldiers, traps, towers, and even the monsters themselves.

Key Features


  • Tamer-All monster can be tamed and use aginst themself.
  • Farm-Just farm nothing special.
  • Spells-Use a variety of spells to slow down, defeat monsters, or double their numbers for extra fun.
  • Towers-Build different types of towers and specialize each one.
  • Archers-Defend your walls with various archers.
  • Castle-Upgrade your castle and see how much it changes.
